title: Evident Technologies
summary: Forensic evidence integrity platform with OCR pipeline, document hashing, chain-of-custody audit logs, and case jacket management.
description: Full-stack legal technology system built to preserve evidentiary admissibility. Features immutable document processing, SHA-256 hashing at every stage, append-only audit logs, and a multi-app satellite architecture hosting four specialized applications under one domain.

title: Epstein Library
summary: DOJ evidence analysis platform with multi-engine document processing, source verification scoring, and chronological timeline reconstruction.
description: Research-grade application for analyzing publicly released DOJ documents. Features three processing engines (forensic, intelligence, academic), automated source verification with confidence scoring, entity and relationship extraction, and full-text search across thousands of exhibits.

title: Civics Hierarchy
summary: Constitutional law reference platform mapping the hierarchy of legal authority from Natural Law through federal, state, and local jurisdictions.
description: Interactive legal education tool with 13 navigable views covering the full spectrum of American constitutional governance. Features structured category navigation, detailed source citations, and responsive design optimized for research workflows.

title: Essential Goods Ledger
summary: Economic analysis platform tracking commodity pricing, supply chain metrics, and cost-of-living indicators with historical trend visualization.
description: Data-driven economic insights application (codename Chronos) providing transparency into essential goods pricing. Features tab-driven category navigation, trend analysis with interactive charts, and household budget impact scoring across food, energy, housing, and healthcare sectors.

title: Geneva Bible Study
summary: Offline-capable Bible study application with full-text search, marginal notes, cross-references, bookmarks, and reading plans.
description: Comprehensive Scripture study tool featuring the Geneva Bible text with original marginal annotations. Includes verse-by-verse navigation, keyword search, personal notes and highlights, customizable reading plans, and Capacitor-based native mobile deployment. The largest application in the Evident ecosystem with 38 interactive views.
